summary: Completed testing of admin authentication, WhatsApp button, service tags removal, and color palette. All 9 requested features are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) Admin auth with JWT - login/verify/logout working, 2) WhatsApp floating button at bottom-24 with default message, 3) Service tags removed from ServicesSection UI (tags exist in DB but not rendered), 4) New color palette applied (olive #4F6D5E, dusty rose #D8A7B1, nude peach #E8C1B5, warm ivory #F5F1EB, old rose #B76E79, gold #DAA609)

admin_login_correct_credentials.details: Login with tyrellflowerstudio@gmail.com / 897355 works, JWT token issued, dashboard loads

admin_login_wrong_credentials.details: Shows error message 'Correo o contraseña incorrectos' in red

admin_dashboard_loads.details: Dashboard loads with all 8 tabs: Marca, Encabezado, Hero, Nosotros, Servicios, Catálogos, Contacto, Pie de Página

admin_brand_editing.details: Brand information form visible with editable fields and Save button

service_tags_removed.details: Service cards in ServicesSection do NOT display POPULAR/EXCLUSIVO tags - correctly removed from UI

whatsapp_button_visible.details: WhatsApp floating button visible at bottom-24 (96px), right-6 (24px), fixed position, green #25D366

color_palette_applied.details: New colors visible: olive #4F6D5E (text), ivory #F5F1EB (body bg), gold #DAA609 (buttons), rose #B76E79

logout_button_works.details: Cerrar sesión button works, clears localStorage token, redirects to login page
